title: Trillion O Trees
description: An overworld mod adding many more tree types and forests... some added structures too
body:
This mod features nine new wood sets and a few other tree styles in an attempt to bring more kinds of new life to the overworld of Minecraft. Please visit the gallery to get better descriptions of what comes in this mod.

Features Pine, Cedar, Willow, Sequoia, Sycamore, Maple, Ash, Cypress, and Hickory trees and wood sets. (ideas to come in the future are Fir, Black Walnut, and Mulberry just to name a few. New Biomes have been added for homes to these trees as well as some added to existing biomes. What can yo build with all the new wood types?

Some features are also still being worked on such as signs and boats, but 90% of items that require wood for crafting can be made from these new wood types as well. But that is why this is a pre-release.

So please feel free to "Buy me a coffee" if you want to support my continued work on this. Thank you so much!
